name: Baked Dilled Salmon on Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a nonstick skillet with olive oil cooking spray.
2. In the skillet, sauté onion, garlic, tomatoes, and mushrooms for 5 minutes or until softened. Add lemon juice and fresh dill. Remove from heat. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Spray a baking dish with cooking oil spray. Spread rice evenly over the bottom.
4. Place salmon fillets on top of the rice. Cover each fillet with the vegetable mixture.
5. Cover the pan with foil.
6. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F.
